series_metadata.series_description: Per ORC 126.16, certified report submitted to the Ohio Department of Administrative Services (DAS) accounting all fixed assets of the office. Records include, but are not limited to, Office of Budget and Management's (OBM) generally accept accounting principles (GAAP) reporting package detailing the capitalized assets, land improvements, vehicles (not in Fleet Ohio), and the DAS' certification report which details total cost, depreciation, and additions/subtractions to AGO asset inventory.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 fiscal years, provided applicable audit reports have been released. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of immediately. ; Electronic: Retain 4 fiscal years, provided applicable audit reports have been released., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
